market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to this expansive family home offering exceptional space at a premium rate. While our nightly rate of £372.60 exceeds the local median by 113% (market avg: £175/night), we aim to provide unmatched comfort for groups of up to 4 guests. With 10 beds available across the property, family reunions, multi-generational vacations, or large work crews can find ample room to spread out. We are just 480 reviews in but remain dedicated to 5-star service. 

Though our current 90-day occupancy (15.2%) lags behind the market average (28.3%), we're proud of our 4.31-star rating and commitment to creating a warm, welcoming atmosphere for all guests. No need to worry about travel logistics - just bring your group and enjoy the comforts of [insert specific features if available]. 

Book in advance to secure the best rates and experience what makes this property a standout choice. We're constantly working to improve and would love the opportunity to host you.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize a wide-angle shot of the living area as the cover photo to showcase the home's spacious layout for groups - this room type drives the strongest engagement for family-oriented listings in this market.
key_diagnosis: Title falsely implies sleeps 10 beds but only accommodates 4 guests (capacity mismatch)
Nightly rate £372.60 is 113% above cohort median (£175) with 90-day occupancy (15.2%) 44% below market (28.3%)
No amenities listed in 480-review history despite high-value categories missing (outdoor, parking, entertainment)
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £372.60/night rate is 113% above local median but occupancy is only 15.2% vs 28.3% average in your area - I'll show how to fix this pricing/performance gap
